description: Test vectors for batch and sync checksums. Checksums are SHA-256 hex digests of the JSON-serialised payload. All implementations must produce identical checksums for identical JSON input.

batch_checksum.name: Single INSERT change
batch_checksum.note: Checksum is computed over JSON.stringify(changes), not per-change

sync_batch_checksum.name: Two rows of user data
sync_batch_checksum.note: Sync batch checksums use the same algorithm over JSON.stringify(rows)

notes: JSON serialisation must produce deterministic output. Field order in objects must match the insertion order of the source language's map/object type.
Floating-point numbers serialise per JSON spec (42.5 not 42.50).
null values are preserved in serialisation.
Implementations that use a different JSON serialisation library must verify output matches these vectors exactly.
